raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The rising number of e-bike collisions and injuries among children can be addressed by prohibiting children under 16 from operating Class 2 throttle e-bikes.",
    "The Beaver Restoration Program advocates for the restoration of beavers back into traditional and historical wildlife habitats, supporting ecosystem conservation.",
    "Strengthening the enforcement on pesticide restrictions in school zones can improve environmental safety.",
    "Expanding the definition of a Community Land Trust can enhance housing security and affordability.",
    "Allowing mobile home residents the time and opportunity to purchase their park can secure long-term housing affordability and stability.",
    "Updating and improving wildfire defensible space and evacuation protocols for schools can enhance safety in high-risk wildfire zones.",
    "Promoting climate-smart practices based on farmer input can improve the effectiveness of the Healthy Soils Program."
  ]
}
```
